security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: blob: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Native WeiDU voice-pack generator for BG2EE.
bundle.longDescription: Scans an installed BG2EE setup, generates missing dialogue voiceovers with local OmniVoice cloning, and exports a native WeiDU-installed voice pack.
